news.title: Spritz-Revolution in Köln: Deutschlands erste Spritzbar „zino’s“ eröffnet im April - prinz.de
news.summary:
# Summary

Germany's first dedicated spritz bar, **zino s**, is opening in Cologne in April, bringing a "spritz revolution" to the city. The venue specializes exclusively in spritzes—the popular Italian aperitif cocktail made with prosecco, aperol, and soda water. Visitors to Cologne should care because it offers a unique dining/drinking experience focused on this trendy beverage, making it a must-visit spot for cocktail enthusiasts and those seeking a distinctive social scene.

news.title: Bedreigd culinair erfgoed: bij deze adressen koop je nog een echte Amsterdamse gemberbolus - Het Parool
news.summary:
# Summary

Amsterdam's traditional gemberbolus (ginger cookie) is disappearing, and the article identifies specific bakeries where you can still buy authentic versions of this classic Dutch treat. Visitors to Amsterdam should care because this is endangered local culinary heritage that represents the city's traditional food culture. The piece highlights which shops still make the genuine article, making it a practical guide for anyone wanting to experience authentic Amsterdam food.

news.title: Spectrum** van Sydney Schutte gaat sluiten; nieuw concept in Waldorf Astoria Amsterdam - De RestaurantKrant
news.summary:
# Summary

Renowned chef Sydney Schutte's two-Michelin-star restaurant **Spectrum** in Amsterdam is closing, but Schutte is launching a new fine dining concept at the **Waldorf Astoria Amsterdam**. Visitors to Amsterdam interested in high-end dining should note this transition, as it means Spectrum will no longer be available, but Schutte's new venture at the luxury hotel will offer an alternative to experience his culinary expertise.

news.title: Meer-is-beterkok Ottolenghi opent restaurant in Amsterdam: ‘Het moet functioneel zijn en mooi. Maar niet duur’ - Het Financieele Dagblad
news.summary:
# Summary

Renowned chef Ottolenghi is opening a new restaurant in Amsterdam that emphasizes being functional and aesthetically pleasing without high prices. Visitors to Amsterdam will want to know about this because Ottolenghi is a celebrated chef known for his distinctive cooking style, making this a significant dining addition to the city's food scene. The restaurant appears to offer quality food and design at accessible price points, appealing to both food enthusiasts and budget-conscious diners.

news.title: IN BEELD. In het voormalige huis van Helmut Lotti en Jelle Van Riet kan je nu hemels dineren - GVA

Visitors to the city will appreciate this unique combination of celebrity history, elegant ambiance, and high-quality cuisine in an intimate, unconventional restaurant space rather than a typical commercial venue.

This incident highlights discriminatory practices at a specific establishment in the Portuguese capital. Visitors to Lisbon should be aware of this bar's reported racist policies when choosing where to dine or socialize.
